---
title: "Katherine M."
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    page-layout: full
---

Your exploratory data analysis of the team datasets go here.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(downlit)
library(xml2)

source(here::here("data", "data_cleaning.R"))

## Theme Settings
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

scale_use_level <- function(...) {
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", name = NULL, ...)
}

scale_use_level_fill <- function(...) {
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2", name = NULL, ...)
}



tech_2018_clean |> 
  filter(tech_type == "artificial intelligence")
```



```{r eval=FALSE}
#summary(merged_panel) # general summary of the dataset
```

# AI Usage Over Time by State
```{r eval=FALSE}
# looking at how general high AI usage has changed by state from 2017-2021
tech_2018_clean |> 
  filter(tech_type == "artificial intelligence") |> 
  filter(naics_sector != "Total") |> 
  filter(naics_sector != "Other") |> 
  filter(naics_sector != "Unknown") |> 
  mutate(n_firms = n_firms/100000) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = state, y = n_firms, fill = use_level)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_use_level_fill() +
  labs(x = "State", y = "# of Firms (in hundred-thousands)",
       title = "AI Usage by State (2018)",
       fill = "AI Usage Level")
```

# AI Usage by Industry
```{r eval=FALSE}
# high AI usage by industry from 2017-2021
tech_2018_clean |> 
  filter(tech_type == "artificial intelligence") |> 
  filter(naics_sector != "Total") |> 
  filter(naics_sector != "Other") |> 
  filter(naics_sector != "Unknown") |> 
  mutate(n_firms = n_firms/100000) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = naics_sector, y = n_firms, fill = use_level)) +
  geom_col() + 
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank()) +
  scale_use_level_fill() +
  labs(x = "Industry", 
       y = "# of Firms (in hundred-thousands)",
       title = "AI Usage by Industry (2017-2021)", 
       fill = "AI Usage Level")
```

# Barriers to AI Usage by Industry (Excluding Total)
```{r eval=FALSE}
tech_2018_clean |>
  filter(tech_type == "artificial intelligence") |>
  filter(naics_sector != "Total") |>
  filter(naics_sector != "Other") |>
  filter(naics_sector != "Unknown") |>
  group_by(naics_sector, use_level) |>
  summarize(n_firms = sum(n_firms, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = use_level, y = naics_sector, fill = n_firms)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log1p", na.value = "grey90") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "AI Usage Level", y = "Industry", fill = "# of Firms",
       title = "AI Usage by Industry",
       subtitle = "AI usage is moderately low, but still varies by industry.")
  
```
